name: [GRV-API] Celery Task Failure Rate Monitor
message:
High Celery task failure rate detected.

Task: {{celery.task_name}}
Failure Rate: {{value}}%
Failed Tasks: {{trace.celery.task.errors}}
Total Tasks: {{trace.celery.task.hits}}
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Task Failure Impact:
- Background jobs not completing successfully
- Potential data consistency issues
- May require manual intervention or retry

Investigation Steps:
1. Check task failures: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources/{{celery.task_name}}?env=prod&view=errors
2. Review task error logs and stack traces
3. Check for external service dependencies
4. Analyze failure patterns and root causes
5. Consider implementing better error handling

Failure Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources/{{celery.task_name}}?env=prod&view=errors

options.escalation_message: Celery task failure rate remains high. Background job reliability severely impacted.
